faqs.question: What types of businesses can use iGourd POS?
faqs.answer: iGourd POS is designed to cater to a wide range of businesses, including retail stores, restaurants, cafes, and service-based businesses. Our flexible system can be customized to meet the specific needs of your industry.

faqs.question: Do you offer on-site installation and training?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide on-site installation and training services to ensure your team is fully equipped to use our POS system effectively. Our expert technicians will set up the hardware and software, and provide comprehensive training tailored to your business needs.

faqs.question: What kind of customer support do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 customer support via phone, email, and live chat. Our dedicated support team is always ready to assist you with any questions or issues you may encounter while using our POS system.

faqs.question: Can iGourd POS integrate with my existing business software?
faqs.answer: Yes, iGourd POS is designed to integrate seamlessly with a variety of business software, including accounting, inventory management, and e-commerce platforms. We can work with you to ensure smooth integration with your existing systems.

items.title: Security & Compliance
items.description: Understand our security measures and compliance standards.

items.question: How do I reset my password?
items.answer: To reset your password, click on the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your email.

items.question: Can I use iGourd POS offline?
items.answer: Yes, iGourd POS has an offline mode that allows you to continue processing transactions even without an internet connection. Data will sync once you're back online.

items.question: How often are software updates released?
items.answer: We typically release software updates on a monthly basis, with critical security patches released as needed.

items.question: Is my data backed up automatically?
items.answer: Yes, we perform automatic backups of your data daily. You can also manually initiate a backup at any time from your account settings.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: At iGourd, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your data when you use our products and services.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect various types of information, including personal information (such as name, email address, and phone number), transaction data, and usage information related to our POS systems and services.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the collected information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, offer customer support, and send important updates and marketing communications (with your consent).

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement robust security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encryption, access controls, and regular security audits.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also opt-out of marketing communications at any time. To exercise these rights, please contact our support team.

sections.title: Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting a notice on our website or sending you an email.

footer.tagline: Transform Your Business with Powerful, Seamless POS Solutions Built For You.
